name: Chocolate White Treasure Brownies
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces (1-1/2 cups) White treasures Baking pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring sugar, butter, and water to a boil in a saucepan.
2. Remove from heat and add semi-sweet chocolate and vanilla.
3. Stir until the chocolate melts and the mixture is smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Blend in dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, and salt).
6. Stir in white treasures.
7. Spread into a greased 9-inch pan.
8. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes.
9. Cool and cut.
